task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the main folder and the three specified lists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left-hand Library pane under 'My Collection', there should be a folder named 'Fells Fire PreAttack 2024'. Inside or under this folder, there should be three lists named 'Command Posts', 'Water Supply', and 'Aviation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three Command Posts waypoints with correct symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Command Posts' list or on the map, look for waypoints named 'ICP' (with a Building icon), 'Stage-North' (with a Car icon), and 'Stage-South' (with a Car icon).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three Water Supply waypoints with correct symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Water Supply' list or on the map, look for waypoints named 'Draft-Spot-Pond' (Food/Water icon), 'Draft-Dark-Hollow' (Food/Water icon), and 'Tanker-Fill' (Danger icon, often a skull/crossbones or warning sign).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the two Aviation waypoints with correct symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Aviation' list or on the map, look for waypoints named 'Helispot-Alpha' (Airport/airplane icon) and 'Lookout-Tower' (Red Flag icon).

task_completion.description: Verify that proximity alerts are set for the Draft waypoints and Helispot-Alpha.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for large red circles around 'Draft-Spot-Pond', 'Draft-Dark-Hollow', and 'Helispot-Alpha' on the map, or look for the 'Proximity' field being filled out (200m or 500m) in the waypoint properties window during the trajectory.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Primary Access' and 'Water Shuttle' routes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for route items named 'Primary Access' and 'Water Shuttle' in the data lists, or visible route lines on the map connecting Stage-North -> ICP -> Stage-South, and Draft-Spot-Pond -> Tanker-Fill -> Draft-Dark-Hollow.

task_completion.description: Verify that the folder was exported as a GPX file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box saving 'fells_preattack_2024.gpx' to the 'C:\workspace\output\' directory, or a terminal/file explorer window confirming the file exists at that location.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Garmin BaseCamp graphical user interface to create the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through BaseCamp menus, using the waypoint/route tools, and typing into BaseCamp dialog boxes, rather than writing a script or text file to generate the GPX.

integrity.description: The export must be performed using BaseCamp's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using 'File > Export' in BaseCamp to generate the final GPX file, rather than using a terminal command like 'echo' or a Python script to bypass the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Folder: 'Fells Fire PreAttack 2024'. Lists: 'Command Posts', 'Water Supply', 'Aviation'. Waypoints required: ICP (Building symbol), Stage-North (Car symbol), Stage-South (Car symbol), Draft-Spot-Pond (Food/Water symbol, 200m proximity), Draft-Dark-Hollow (Food/Water symbol, 200m proximity), Tanker-Fill (Danger symbol), Helispot-Alpha (Airport symbol, 500m proximity), Lookout-Tower (Flag, Red symbol). Routes required: 'Primary Access' (Stage-North -> ICP -> Stage-South) and 'Water Shuttle' (Draft-Spot-Pond -> Tanker-Fill -> Draft-Dark-Hollow). Export path: C:\workspace\output\fells_preattack_2024.gpx. Proximity alerts in BaseCamp visually appear as red circles around the waypoint on the map.
